final:
module top_module(
    input deny_all,
    input req_b,
    input req_c,
    output reg grant
);always @(*) begin
    if(deny_all && !req_b && !req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else if(!deny_all && req_b && !req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else if(!deny_all && !req_b && req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else if(deny_all && req_b && !req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else if(deny_all && !req_b && req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else if(!deny_all && req_b && req_c) begin
        grant = 1;
    end
    else begin
        grant = 0;
    end
end

endmodule
